channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 585db2ed-219e-4821-a06a-c6c14b602afa
Display name: Healthcare Interop Contributor
Description: Allows all actions on healthcare interop provider resources
